blockedAssertions.blockedBy: The mocked checkpoint listing coverage proves the `/fine_tuning/jobs/{id}/checkpoints` route, checkpoint `id`, `fine_tuned_model_checkpoint`, `metrics.train_loss`, and unknown metric preservation via `metrics.extra["custom_metric"]`. But the test never asserts `step_number`, and source inspection shows `FineTuningCheckpoint.step_number` is `#[serde(default)]`, so the currently observed pass does not fully prove the checkpoint identity envelope required by the contract.

The mocked controls test proves distinct `supervised` and `reinforcement` create payloads plus typed `list_events`, `pause`, and `resume` operations. However, the contract explicitly names `dpo` alongside those methods, and no assigned mocked cargo test exercises a DPO create payload even though the SDK surface exposes that variant, so the full method-variant matrix remains unproven.

appliedUpdates.description: Recorded that advanced-platform entitlement-aware live smokes live inside the containers/skills/videos contract binaries and that the staged project credentials successfully reached those surfaces on 2026-04-06.
